understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through the KA59 puzzle game level by level and win each level by placing every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously, within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece on a grid where each cell corresponds to 3 pixels, using the pixel-coordinate system shown in player.position and objects positions. If a pushable object (e.g., a block) is directly adjacent in the movement direction, the move can push it along as the selected piece advances, subject to collisions. Walls/boundaries can block or alter movement, and the movement.*_blocked flags are only hints that something is adjacent (they do not guarantee the move fails). When multiple selectable pieces exist, control is switched with CLICK by providing the exact pixel coordinates of the target selectable piece.
